sourcePrompt: A MiG-17 "Fresco", the NVA's nimble Soviet jet fighter, about eleven meters long, parked nose-high on tricycle gear. The whole nose is a round open air intake; a bubble canopy sits close behind it over a slim barrel fuselage that tapers straight to a single exhaust. Mid-set wings sweep back hard wearing low fences across their tops, and the swept tailplane rides halfway up the tall swept fin. Bare polished silver with red-star markings, light and quick.
